name: testimonial-card
role: Single testimonial card. Renders a customer quote with attribution (name, title, company, avatar). Three variants: compact (chip-sized, fits in a grid cell), default (card-sized, fits two-up on desktop), featured (full-width with display-tier pull-quote treatment). Variants are not visual flourishes — they correspond to layout slots a marketing template uses (grid cell vs. testimonial section vs. hero pull-quote).

semanticChildren: <blockquote> — the testimonial body (theme uses --font-serif at type-size-md by default; featured variant uses --text-display composite)
<cite> — the customer's name (rendered without italic — cite element is semantic not stylistic)
<avatar-stack> — the customer's avatar (single by default; team-testimonial uses count=N)

ratingPattern.stars: renders 5 filled/unfilled star glyphs; aria-label="<rating> out of 5 stars"

variants.compact: type-size-sm body, avatar size=sm, no rating, no logo. Used in 6-tile grids.
variants.default: type-size-md body, avatar size=md, optional rating, optional company-logo footer. Used in 3-up grids.
variants.featured: type-size-2xl pull-quote body, avatar size=lg, prominent attribution. Used as section-anchor element.

meta.loadingBehavior: render skeleton lines matching default-line-count (4 lines body, 1 line attribution, 1 avatar circle). 'loading' attribute = true.

ariaPatterns.figcaptionVoiceOver: screen readers announce blockquote body then figcaption; ensure attribution reads as second-class info
ariaPatterns.starsRating: aria-label on the rating element only; do NOT label individual stars

name: testimonial-grid
role: Composition primitive for laying out multiple testimonial-cards. Renders a responsive grid (1-col mobile → 2-col tablet → 3-col desktop by default; 6-tile dense variant supports 4×6 on large viewports). Handles empty / sparse / dense / loading states at the grid level rather than per-card.

meta.responsiveGrid: grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)) when density=normal; minmax(240px, 1fr) when dense; full 1-col when sparse.

stateBehavior.empty: render empty-state primitive ('No testimonials yet. Be the first.') with optional CTA
stateBehavior.loading: render N skeleton testimonial-cards at the grid's expected density
stateBehavior.error: render error-state ('Couldn't load testimonials. Retry.') with retry action
